languages.text: "Вот как. Видимо, меня неверно информировали". {n}Капитан изучающе рассматривает вас с головы до пят, словно бы сканируя холодным взглядом.{/n} "Ничего удивительного".
"I see. It seems I was misinformed." {n}The captain surveys you from head to toe with a cold, scrutinising look.{/n} "Hardly surprising."
languages.original_text: "Вот как. Видимо, меня неверно информировали". {n}Капитан изучающе рассматривает вас с головы до пят, словно бы сканируя холодным взглядом.{/n} "Ничего удивительного".

traits.locale_text: "I see. It seems I was misinformed." {n}The captain surveys you from head to toe with a cold, scrutinising look.{/n} "Hardly surprising."
"I see. It seems I was misinformed." {n}The captain surveys you from head to toe with a cold, scrutinising look.{/n} "Hardly surprising."
"I see. It seems I was misinformed." {n}The captain surveys you from head to toe with a cold, scrutinising look.{/n} "Hardly surprising."

languages.text: «Ya veo. Parece que no estaba bien informado». {n}El capitán te examina de pies a cabeza con una mirada fría y analítica.{/n} «No me sorprende».
languages.original_text: "I see. It seems I was misinformed." {n}The captain surveys you from head to toe with a cold, scrutinising look.{/n} "Hardly surprising."

traits.locale_text: «Ya veo. Parece que no estaba bien informado». {n}El capitán te examina de pies a cabeza con una mirada fría y analítica.{/n} «No me sorprende».

languages.text: “我明白了。看来是我情报有误。”{n}上尉用冰冷、审视的目光把你从头到脚打量了一遍。{/n}“这也不奇怪。”
languages.original_text: "I see. It seems I was misinformed." {n}The captain surveys you from head to toe with a cold, scrutinising look.{/n} "Hardly surprising."

traits.locale_text: “我明白了。看来是我情报有误。”{n}上尉用冰冷、审视的目光把你从头到脚打量了一遍。{/n}“这也不奇怪。”

languages.text: « Je vois. Sans doute m'a-t-on mal renseigné. » {n}Le capitaine vous détaille de la tête aux pieds d'un regard froid et scrutateur.{/n} « Ce ne serait pas la première fois. »
languages.original_text: "I see. It seems I was misinformed." {n}The captain surveys you from head to toe with a cold, scrutinising look.{/n} "Hardly surprising."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois. Sans doute m'a-t-on mal renseigné. » {n}Le capitaine vous détaille de la tête aux pieds d'un regard froid et scrutateur.{/n} « Ce ne serait pas la première fois. »

languages.text: "Anlıyorum. Görünüşe göre bana yanlış bilgi verilmiş." {n}Yüzbaşı, soğuk ve inceleyici bir bakışla seni baştan aşağı süzüyor.{/n} "Şaşırmadım."
languages.original_text: "I see. It seems I was misinformed." {n}The captain surveys you from head to toe with a cold, scrutinising look.{/n} "Hardly surprising."

traits.locale_text: "Anlıyorum. Görünüşe göre bana yanlış bilgi verilmiş." {n}Yüzbaşı, soğuk ve inceleyici bir bakışla seni baştan aşağı süzüyor.{/n} "Şaşırmadım."

languages.text: "Verstehe. Ich war offenbar falsch informiert." {n}Der Captain mustert dich mit einem kalten, abschätzigen Blick von Kopf bis Fuß.{/n} "Das überrascht mich nicht."
languages.original_text: "I see. It seems I was misinformed." {n}The captain surveys you from head to toe with a cold, scrutinising look.{/n} "Hardly surprising."

traits.locale_text: "Verstehe. Ich war offenbar falsch informiert." {n}Der Captain mustert dich mit einem kalten, abschätzigen Blick von Kopf bis Fuß.{/n} "Das überrascht mich nicht."

languages.text: 「なるほど。どうやら私は誤った情報を得ていたようです。」{n}船長はあなたを冷酷な目で頭からつま先まで観察する。{/n}「驚くことではありません。」
languages.original_text: "I see. It seems I was misinformed." {n}The captain surveys you from head to toe with a cold, scrutinising look.{/n} "Hardly surprising."

traits.locale_text: 「なるほど。どうやら私は誤った情報を得ていたようです。」{n}船長はあなたを冷酷な目で頭からつま先まで観察する。{/n}「驚くことではありません。」
